_meta.session: BMT batch 1 — Priority 8 agent breadth. 5 benchmarks registered. Paper cohorts are pre-frontier (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Llama 3.1) or mid-2025 (Claude Sonnet 4, GPT-5); no verified scores for the Claude Opus 4.7/Mythos / GPT-5.4 / Gemini 3.1 Pro / Grok 4.20 / Kimi K2.5 / GLM-5 frontier set. Metadata-only ingest for future scout.

benchmarks.name: Windows Agent Arena
benchmarks.description: Microsoft 154 Windows desktop tasks (complement to OSWorld Ubuntu).

benchmarks.name: ScienceAgentBench
benchmarks.description: 102 peer-review-derived data-science tasks (distinct from PaperBench implementation).

benchmarks.name: MCP-Bench
benchmarks.description: Accenture: 28 live MCP servers × 250 tools (complement to MCP-Atlas).

benchmarks.name: LiveMCPBench
benchmarks.description: ICIP-CAS: 95 live MCP tasks with dynamic tool landscape.

benchmarks.name: BrowseComp-Plus
benchmarks.description: 830 queries × 100k doc fixed corpus (fairer successor to BrowseComp).
